query:
SELECT id, section, entity, status, progress, current_stage, row_count, triggered_by,
  DATE_FORMAT(started_at, '%H:%i:%s') AS started,
  DATE_FORMAT(finished_at, '%H:%i:%s') AS finished
FROM sync_logs
WHERE section IN ('Boonphone', 'boonphone')
ORDER BY started_at DESC
LIMIT 6;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute

  DATE_FORMAT(started_at, '%H:%i:%s') AS started,
  DATE_FORMAT(finished_at, '%H:%i:%s') AS finished
FROM sync_logs
WHERE section IN ('Boonphone', 'boonphone')
ORDER BY started_at DESC
LIMIT 6;
